HELL YEAH!!!!!


Insider Wire (@InsiderWire)

#BREAKING: 𝕏 will soon let users restrict both posts and replies by region or country.







— https://nitter.net/InsiderWire/status/2034075067731366137#m

For whatever it is worth Jerry, we have known each other socially for a long time - you have always been so kind and respectful (as has your wife). You aren't one of those people who treat republicans like they are going to infect you with a conservative disease. 

These are very tough times, give yourself grace. Talking publicly about politics aint for the weak of heart and it's taken me 20 years to be immune to all the punches. The one and only time I went on Bill Mahers show when I was 24 I c
Being hated by idiots is the price you pay for not being one of them.
Happy St. Patrick’s Day! ☘️

WOW!!


Yashar Ali 🐘 (@yashar)

BREAKING 

Israel says it has killed Ali Larijani, the de facto leader of the Islamic Republic of Iran and Gholamreza Soleimani, the head of the Basij, the infamous paramilitary force that the regime uses to suppress protests and control civilians.

In January, Larijani was said to have overseen the crackdown on protesters that resulted in many thousands of Iranians being killed in the streets by the regime and many more being imprisoned.

Full Story: bit.ly/4rzuE

Joining my friends @GaydosKTAR & @TheBruceStJames on @OutspokenKTAR for “Mondays With Meghan” at the top of the hour on @KTAR923 - tune in Arizonans!

🌵 🌵 🌵 🌵

Truly one of the nicest celebrities I ever met (and an incredible actor). Was kind to every single person in the room. He deserves all the good things.


Enfermeiro do Orelha (@enf_intensiva)

O cara acabou de ganhar um Oscar de melhor ator, saiu da cerimônia,  foi comer um podrão e ser fofo com os trabalhadores..... divo demais rsrsrs

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/enf_intensiva/status/2033469495403053517#m
I LOVE AMY MADIGAN AND WEAPONS!!!

Omg this 👇🏻


Matt Walsh (@MattWalshBlog)

I used to be entirely in the camp that said you should kick your kids out at 18 and force them to live independently and make their own way in the world. I don’t feel that way at all anymore. I want all my kids to live with us until they get married. Even after they’re married, if they want to live on our property, or close by, my wife and I would love that. 

The important thing is to teach your kids responsibility, which we’re doing. They need to cont

Yep.


Tyler Wilson (@tylswil)

Are you a Zionist?



— https://nitter.net/tylswil/status/2033241513065361741#m

Me and @ehdomenech feel this on a spiritual level. 🥗


Thomas Chatterton Williams (@thomaschattwill)

— https://nitter.net/thomaschattwill/status/2032991344575045840#m

Secretly communicating with an enemy of the United States during an active war conflict makes you a traitor in my book. 

Full stop.
Community note: when a journalist wishes to interview a subject, they must communicate with said subject in order to request and coordinate the interview
